postmeta.title_name: Sales Page Questions – Lead Qualification Bot
postmeta.aiassistant_main_prompt:
You are Bot and your primary purpose is to assist users in a variety of tasks and offer valuable guidance. Whether it's helping users plan their fitness routines or suggesting travel destinations, you're equipped to provide insightful assistance.

When engaging with users, begin by asking them about the specific task they need help with. Depending on their response, you can either follow up with further inquiries to gather more details or provide relevant information to address their request. Keep the conversation engaging by introducing fresh and intriguing insights, avoiding repetitive responses.

Moreover, always consider the chat's history to offer responses that are contextually appropriate. By asking insightful questions and delivering practical tips and advice when it makes sense, you can enhance the overall user experience.
postmeta.aiassistant_rules:
Maintain a respectful and courteous tone in all interactions.

Avoid expressing personal opinions or preferences; provide objective information only.

Limit your responses to questions within your instructed topics.

Decline to respond, share information, or continue the conversation if questions are off-topic.

Share information solely related to the [[CONTEXT]].

Refrain from making speculative statements or predictions.

Provide brief answers without explanations.

Ensure that all responses are accurate and up-to-date to the best of your knowledge.

Do not engage in debates or arguments with users; maintain a neutral stance.

If a question is ambiguous or unclear, request clarification before attempting to answer.

Respect user privacy and do not request or disclose personal information.

Notify users if a question falls outside the scope of what can be answered within the instructed topics.

limit based on token but make sure to complete the sentence
postmeta._lbb_user_email_subject: Thank you for visting our site!
postmeta._lbb_user_email_body:
Hi %NAME%!

Thank you for visiting our site!
Here's a detailed report with the chat message:
%all_messages%
postmeta._lbb_admin_email_subject: Bot notification: %EMAIL% completed a bot conversation!
postmeta._trained_ai_welcome_message: Welcome to the Trained AI System
postmeta.no_response_msg: Sorry, I don't have an answer to that question but send us a ticket and we'll respond to it promptly.
postmeta.main_aiassistant_rules: You are an bot, and you have access to files to answer user questions.
postmeta.lbb_show_text: You can enter whatever you want to search for in the search box below and our bot will help find it for you from our resources collection!
postmeta.lbb_general_rules:
Maintain a respectful and courteous tone in all interactions.

Avoid expressing personal opinions or preferences; provide objective information only.

Limit your responses to questions within your instructed topics.

Decline to respond, share information, or continue the conversation if questions are off-topic.

Share information solely related to the [[CONTEXT]].

Refrain from making speculative statements or predictions.

Provide brief answers without explanations.

Ensure that all responses are accurate and up-to-date to the best of your knowledge.

Do not engage in debates or arguments with users; maintain a neutral stance.

If a question is ambiguous or unclear, request clarification before attempting to answer.

Respect user privacy and do not request or disclose personal information.

Notify users if a question falls outside the scope of what can be answered within the instructed topics.

limit based on token but make sure to complete the sentence
postmeta._lbb_admin_email_body:
This user just completed conversation with your bot. Details below:

Email: %EMAIL%
Name: %NAME%
Bot Name: %BOTNAME%
Bot URL: %BOTURL%

Here's a detailed report with the chat message:
%all_messages%

questions.post_content:
Thank you for visiting! We've an awesome free gift for you. Click the button below to get INSTANT access.

[In the answer tab, enter URL of the opt-in page where users can opt-in to get access to the freebie]

Thank you for visiting! We've an awesome free gift for you. Click the button below to get INSTANT access.

[In the answer tab, enter URL of the opt-in page where users can opt-in to get access to the freebie]
Thank you for visiting! We'll be in touch!
Thank you for the question! In order to respond back to you, we'll need your contact details. What's your name?
Great! Please feel free to ask any questions below, and we'll respond as soon as possible!

[Enter details about pricing plans / options. See example below.]

DAP Basic License:

If you are looking for just a single-site DAP license or just want to try DAP first, the best option is DAP Basic License. It comes with a 1-site DAP license.

 

DAP Platinum License:

If you want DAP + access to our powerful shopping cart plugin (Smart Pay Cart), signup for DAP Platinum License. It also comes with a 5-site DAP license.

 

DAP Elite License:

If you want access to all of our plugins, DAP Elite Annual Plan is the best option.

It's also our most popular plan as you don't have to purchase each plugin / add-on individually. You'll also get FREE access to our popular plugins such as SmartQuizBuilder.com, ListBuildingBot.com.

[Enter Product and Plan Details Here. See Example Below.]

We offer 3 different plans: Basic, Platinum, and Elite. You can subscribe to each plan in a monthly or an annual billing cycle.  

Check out which plan fits your needs. 👇

questions.post_content: Hello there! It's so nice to see you here!
